project_type: Full-stack monorepo: Next.js 15 frontend + Python FastAPI backend + MCP servers
build_system: pnpm for frontend, pip/uvicorn for backend, docker-compose for orchestration
test_framework: N/A - greenfield, tests to be added as needed
build_command: cd frontend && pnpm build (frontend); cd backend && python -m py_compile app/main.py (backend syntax check)
test_command: cd frontend && pnpm lint (frontend); cd backend && python -c 'import app.main' (backend import check)
verification_instructions: 1. Frontend: pnpm install && pnpm build succeeds. 2. Backend: pip install deps && python -c imports work. 3. Docker-compose config validates.
setup_instructions: Frontend: cd frontend && pnpm install. Backend: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt. MCP: cd mcp-servers/google-calendar && pip install -e . (same for google-tasks)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22, Python 3.9, pnpm 10 available. $300 GCP budget - use free tiers and cheap models (Gemini Flash).
key_patterns: Greenfield - establishing patterns: Next.js App Router with TypeScript, FastAPI with async/await, MCP servers as standalone packages, Three.js with custom GLSL shaders, WebSocket for real-time communication, Google OAuth via NextAuth.js
directory_structure: ChronAI/ - monorepo root. frontend/ - Next.js 15 App Router. backend/ - Python FastAPI. mcp-servers/ - MCP server packages (google-calendar, google-tasks). shared/ - shared types/schemas. docker-compose.yml at root.
